description: Create a view named DAILY_INVENTORY_FULL that transforms sparse inventory change events from the INVENTORY_LOG table (LOG_ID, PRODUCT_ID, CHANGE_DATE, NEW_QUANTITY) into a complete daily snapshot for January 2026. The view must include columns REPORT_DATE, PRODUCT_ID, and STOCK_LEVEL, generating a row for every day from 2026-01-01 to 2026-01-31 for every product found in the log. For days with no recorded changes, the STOCK_LEVEL should carry forward the last known value (Last Observation Carried Forward), defaulting to 0 if a product has no history before a specific date. If multiple changes occur on the same day, use the value associated with the highest LOG_ID.
